name: vivi-agent-loop
description: Fetch and reply to published Vivi browser reviews on demand while coding with Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Pull published Vivi reviews when needed.
interface.longDescription: Vivi Agent Loop teaches Codex to fetch published feedback once, reply safely, and refresh before resolving without running a resident inbox listener.
interface.defaultPrompt: Fetch my published Vivi review when needed and reply through Vivi.
